rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing paper’s stated gap and extension: it estimates multimedia channel elasticities from single-source customer data and performs media budget optimization, while the citing paper explicitly extends macro advertising allocation to microtargeting using single-source multichannel retail data. This overlap in constructs (channel effectiveness, optimization, single-source data, retail campaign outcomes) suggests the citation is plausibly substantive rather than incidental, even though the raw match evidence is only a DOI-level reference entry.
